title: Cat 3b — eb-agent drift tools (drift-liveness + drift-vpcpeering)
description: Cat 3b completes the Cat 3 arc by adding the two SR-dependent drift tools deferred from Cat 3 partial. Both tools were blocked at Cat 3 partial authoring time on SR schema preconditions from canvas F0B7UB6BGR4 — Item A livenessProbe (resource-access.schema.json v1.1.0, merged SR PR #108 a2f8a79) and Item B vpcPeerings (infrastructure-catalog.schema.json v1.2.0, merged SR PR #106 98534ab). Both preconditions now landed on schema-registry main 7129734. Tool 1 — drift-liveness — reads credentialItem.livenessProbe.lastVerifiedResult across resource-access.json instances and surfaces credentials with auth-failed or network-failed results; not-tested is excluded from drift output by default (initial state per schema, not a drift signal). Tool 2 — drift-vpcpeering — reads catalog.vpcPeerings[] from infrastructure-catalog.json instances and surfaces peerings with status pending-elimination, ordered by createdAt where present. Both tools follow the Cat 3 partial pattern at agent/src/agent/tools/ with parallel tests at agent/tests/ and registration in agent/agent.yaml under tools.venture. Substrate read against EB main 83c06d4 (Cat 3 partial closed via PR #288) precedes scope authoring this round — scopeFiles paths verified against actual repo layout, not inferred. Tool surface delta: 29 → 31 on merge. Closes the Cat 3 arc started 2026-06-02 with the original 9-tool scope; ships as two waves (Cat 3 partial 7 tools + Cat 3b 2 tools) due to SR schema dependency. Same cross-repo execution shape applies — EB authors spec body (this artifact), SR lands instance, EB executes against anchored spec, SR closes with EB merge SHA and TRUTH-DELIVERED at S8 per pattern proven on Cat 3 partial closure PR #109 7129734.

outputs.description: Two new eb-agent drift tools + unit tests + agent.yaml registration + AGENTS.md update on luh-tech/Ectropy-Business. Single PR off feat/eb-agent-cat3b-drift-tools-2026-06-03 branch. Tool 1 — drift-liveness (~90 LoC) — reads credentialItem.livenessProbe.lastVerifiedResult across resource-access.json; surfaces credentials with lastVerifiedResult in {auth-failed, network-failed}; not-tested excluded by default per schema description (initial state, not drift); output includes credentialItem.itemId, itemName, role, lastVerifiedResult, lastVerifiedReachable, verifiedBy — no credential values, only identifiers per memory #9. Tool 2 — drift-vpcpeering (~80 LoC) — reads catalog.vpcPeerings[] across infrastructure-catalog.json; surfaces peerings with status=pending-elimination; output includes id, envA, envB, region, status, trackedByFollowUp, createdAt, notes. Both tools mirror Cat 3 partial scaffold (class-based Tool subclass with run() returning ToolResult, module exports TOOL = <Name>). Tests at agent/tests/ follow Cat 1+2+3 partial pattern — happy-path test (synthetic substrate with no drift, returns empty list) + drift-detected-path test (synthetic substrate with known drift, returns list containing that drift) + credential-leak assertion (no credential values in output for drift-liveness). agent.yaml registration adds drift_liveness and drift_vpcpeering to tools.venture (current venture block ends with coverage_deliverable_fks; append after). AGENTS.md updates the Cat 3 section header from 'Cat 3 partial' to 'Cat 3' once Cat 3b lands, and lists drift-liveness + drift-vpcpeering alongside the 7 Cat 3 partial tools.

drift-vpcpeering has happy-path test (no drift → empty list) and drift-detected test (pending-elimination peering → present in output)
drift-liveness output assertion: no credential values present (only itemId, itemName, role, livenessProbe fields)
eb-agent surface count grows 29 → 31 (verified by eb-agent --help)
AGENTS.md Cat 3 section updated to list both new tools and section header changed from 'Cat 3 partial' to 'Cat 3'
pytest passes for both new tests with zero failures, zero errors
PR CI green on Roadmap CI workflow (pre-existing baseline drift on follow-up-register.json meta.byPriority handled per RULE-CI-UNSTABLE-GATES-IDENTICALLY-RED-1 if still present)

notes: Completes the Cat 3 arc — originally scoped as 9 tools (7 SR-independent + 2 SR-dependent) at planning 2026-06-02. Shipped as two waves because two tools required SR schema extensions on canonical schemas served at schemas.luh.tech. Cat 3 partial (PR #288 83c06d4) delivered the 7 SR-independent tools 2026-06-03. Cat 3b (this deliverable) delivers the 2 SR-dependent tools — drift-liveness against credentialItem.livenessProbe (resource-access.schema.json v1.1.0) and drift-vpcpeering against catalog.vpcPeerings[] (infrastructure-catalog.schema.json v1.2.0). Cross-repo execution shape — proven end-to-end on Cat 3 partial — applies: EB authors spec body chat-side; SR-chat reshapes if needed (not expected this round since spec authored against canonical schema directly) and lands deliverable instance via micro-PR; EB terminal executes 2 tools + 2 tests + agent.yaml + AGENTS.md + tracking FU in single PR against anchored spec; SR re-opens instance at EB OUT-1 merge to transition S6→S7→S8 with EB merge SHA in transitions and authors TRUTH-DELIVERED at schemas/_instances/truth-delivered/. Coordination canvases for Cat 3 arc: F0B83PF9LD7 (EB Cat 3 request), F0B7VHT6KAP (SR Cat 3 ACK), F0B85LNSTC4 (SR Cat 3 reshape doctrine — canonical schema shape reference for EB future deliverables), F0B7VQHDV51 (SR Cat 3 instance merge ack), F0B8612NEF6 (EB Cat 3 amendment ask), F0B82DAB07L (SR Cat 3 amendment dispatch), F0B82Q4NGQ2 (SR Item A livenessProbe LANDED + Cat 3b unblock), F0B82R3E33L (EB Cat 3 partial MERGED + Cat 3b unblock ack), F0B7MGY2NCX (SR Cat 3 closure LANDED + first TRUTH-DELIVERED). Substrate read provenance: EB terminal verbatim report 2026-06-03 confirmed EB main 83c06d4 with 7 Cat 3 tool files present, agent.yaml venture section ends with coverage_deliverable_fks (Cat 3b appends after), AGENTS.md Cat 3 section header 'Cat 3 partial' to be updated to 'Cat 3' in OUT-1, SR main 7129734 with both schema preconditions live. Retention: permanent schema-bound governance record per memory rule no-md-terminus. Branch disposition: delete on merge per canonical branching flow. SPIKE primitive available if substrate exceeds spec mid-flight, but no SPIKE expected — both schema shapes verified pre-authoring. Future Cat-N pattern: Cat 4 (write tools) and Cat 5 (cross-venture queries) noted in chat session for future consideration; not committed in current arc.
